recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR Disclosure Quality
recommendations.description: Improve BRSR disclosures ahead of the FY26 filing deadline to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions, maintaining the recent ratings upgrade.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹50,000 Cr debt saves ₹100-200 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Publish Comprehensive TCFD Report
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a TCFD-aligned climate risk report including Scope 3 emissions to attract ESG-focused investors and improve ESG ratings.
recommendations.profitability_link: Matching SBI’s ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows could yield a 5-10% valuation premium, potentially increasing market cap by ₹1500-3000 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published India's first bank-level TCFD report, attracting ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Strengthen ESG Disclosure to Sustain Ratings
recommendations.description: Implement quarterly ESG disclosure reviews to maintain transparency and prevent reversal of recent ratings upgrades.
recommendations.profitability_link: Sustaining improved ratings avoids cost of capital increase, saving ₹100-200 Cr per year.

recommendations.title: Achieve DJSI Inclusion
recommendations.description: Target inclusion in the Dow Jones Sustainability Index to leverage ESG fund inflows and secure a 5-10% valuation premium.
recommendations.profitability_link: A 5-10% valuation premium on ₹30,000 Cr market cap could add ₹1500-3000 Cr in value.

immediate_low.title: Strengthen ESG Disclosure to Sustain Ratings
